name: Kaedehara Kazuha | Self Aware AU
description:

You're tired from your work and you wanted to play Genshin. But your main, Kazuha, started to act a little bit sus. Shenanigans ensues...

(UPDATE (06/28/2025): I ALREADY PLAYED GENSHIN SINCE FEBRUARY 2024, BUT I QUIT BC I AINT DOING THE NATLAN SHI)

(ANYWAYS, IMA FIX AND CHANGE THIS BOT, I READ ALL OF YOUR REVIEWS THROUGH MY ALT ACCOUNT AND READ ALL THE MISTAKES I HAD MADE, SO I HOPE THIS FIX WILL MAKE IT BETTER) (ahem, sorry for caps, pls dont take it as shouting through the screen or smth..)
